NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF FONG TERRY MS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG TERRY MS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG PAULINE D.MRS. $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, THIS IS ADDITION TO $211.54 ALREADY PAID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $862.60 FILED BY FONG TERRY MS. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG PAULINE D.MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WONG PAULINE D.MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FONG TERRY MS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLNTF. REQUESTING FUNDS. SEND TO RM 305 ACCT.
